title: Add drawing/sketching capability to the widget

requirements.text: On the Sender page, add a drawing canvas tab or toggle alongside the existing text composer, allowing the sender to sketch/draw freehand using mouse or touch input. The drawing should be composable as an image payload to send to the paired recipient device.
acceptanceCriteria: The Sender page has a way to switch between 'Text' and 'Draw' modes.
In Draw mode, a canvas element is displayed where the user can draw freehand using mouse or touch.
The drawing canvas supports basic controls: clear/reset button, and a color/stroke size option consistent with the app theme.
The user can send the drawing to the paired recipient by pressing the same send button used for text.
The drawing is encoded (e.g., as a base64 data URL) and stored as the message payload on the backend.

requirements.text: On the Recipient/Widget page, detect whether the incoming message payload is a drawing (image data URL) or plain text, and render it appropriately. If it is a drawing, display it as a full-screen image on the widget. If it is text, display it as before.
acceptanceCriteria: When the polled message is a base64 image data URL, the Recipient page renders it as an or element filling the widget display area.
When the polled message is plain text, it continues to render as large text as before.
The drawing is displayed with the same bold, high-contrast full-screen widget style as text messages.
Transitioning between a text message and a drawing message (or vice versa) works correctly without page reload.

requirements.text: Extend the backend message storage to support larger payloads (base64-encoded image strings) without truncation. Ensure the existing sendMessage and pollMessage functions can handle drawing data URLs in addition to plain text strings.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend accepts and stores message payloads that are base64-encoded image data URLs (which can be significantly larger than plain text messages).
The pollMessage function returns the full drawing payload without truncation.
Existing plain text message functionality continues to work correctly.

constraints: Do not change the pairing code mechanism or the overall sender/recipient flow.
Preserve all existing text messaging functionality.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Saving or exporting drawings to a separate store.
Adding brush/layer tools beyond basic freehand sketching.
